# hackflare v0.1.0 - Table of Contents

## Modules

- [Hackflare](Hackflare.md): Hackflare is a Cloudflare alternative built for HackClub.
- [Hackflare.Application](Hackflare.Application.md): The OTP Application entry point and supervision tree for Hackflare.
- [Hackflare.Mailer](Hackflare.Mailer.md): Email service for Hackflare using Swoosh.
- [Hackflare.Nameserver](Hackflare.Nameserver.md): Manages the DNS nameserver process and native Rust integration.
- [Hackflare.Native](Hackflare.Native.md): Rust NIF (Native Implemented Function) bindings for DNS operations.
- [Hackflare.Repo](Hackflare.Repo.md): The Ecto Repository for Hackflare database operations.
- [HackflareWeb](HackflareWeb.md): The entrypoint for defining your web interface and Phoenix components.
- [HackflareWeb.CoreComponents](HackflareWeb.CoreComponents.md): Provides core UI components.
- [HackflareWeb.Endpoint](HackflareWeb.Endpoint.md)
- [HackflareWeb.ErrorHTML](HackflareWeb.ErrorHTML.md): This module is invoked by your endpoint in case of errors on HTML requests.
- [HackflareWeb.ErrorJSON](HackflareWeb.ErrorJSON.md): This module is invoked by your endpoint in case of errors on JSON requests.
- [HackflareWeb.Gettext](HackflareWeb.Gettext.md): A module providing Internationalization with a gettext-based API.
- [HackflareWeb.Layouts](HackflareWeb.Layouts.md): This module holds layouts and related functionality
used by your application.

- [HackflareWeb.PageController](HackflareWeb.PageController.md): Controller for static pages in the Hackflare web application.
- [HackflareWeb.PageHTML](HackflareWeb.PageHTML.md): This module contains pages rendered by PageController.
- [HackflareWeb.Router](HackflareWeb.Router.md): HTTP Router for Hackflare web application.
- [HackflareWeb.Telemetry](HackflareWeb.Telemetry.md)
